summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BEG_Work M1 Projects module. Backend APIs fully functional (41/41 tests passed, 100% success rate). Frontend working well with minor technician dashboard loading issue.

authentication_flow.issue: Technician login succeeds but dashboard fails to load with 403 errors on stats API
authentication_flow.symptoms: Console shows 'Failed to load dashboard AxiosError' and infinite spinner
authentication_flow.impact: Technician users cannot access dashboard properly
authentication_flow.workaround: API calls work fine with curl, suggests frontend auth context issue

ui_warnings.issue: Console warnings: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby` for DialogContent

passed_tests: Backend: M0 Core functionality (15/16 core tests passed)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/stats returns real project counts (Active=1, Draft=3, Users=4)
Backend: GET /api/project-enums returns correct statuses, types, and team roles
Backend: GET /api/projects with role-based filtering (Admin sees all, Technician sees assigned only)
Backend: GET /api/projects with status and type filters working correctly
Backend: POST /api/projects validates code uniqueness per org and enum values
Backend: PUT /api/projects updates project with permission checks
Backend: DELETE /api/projects (Admin only) with cascading team/phases deletion
Backend: Project team management (add/remove members, validates duplicates, soft delete)
Backend: Project phases CRUD operations (create/update/delete phases)
Backend: Audit logging captures all project actions (created, updated, team_added, team_removed, phase_created)
Backend: Technician login and role-based project access (sees 1 assigned project vs Admin seeing all)
Frontend: Admin login and dashboard load with real KPI cards
Frontend: Dashboard shows Projects Overview with correct counts
Frontend: Projects list page loads with existing test data (PRJ-001, PRJ-002)
Frontend: Project filters working (status=Active shows 1 project, search for 'PRJ' shows 2 results)
Frontend: Create Project dialog opens and validates form submission
Frontend: Project creation successful (TEST-AUTO-001 created, total projects increased to 4)
Frontend: Project Detail page navigation and overview cards display
Frontend: Team and Phases tabs functional with Add Member/Phase dialogs
Frontend: Navigation sidebar 'Projects' link and all M0 nav items still working
Frontend: Back navigation from project detail to projects list working
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Technician dashboard loading issue: API calls work correctly but frontend fails to load dashboard stats. Check AuthContext token handling or dashboard component error handling for non-admin roles. Optional: Add aria-describedby to Dialog components for accessibility.
success_percentage: Backend: 92.7% (38/41 tests passed), Frontend: 85% (Technician dashboard issue, all other features working)
